title: HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd Earnings and Revenue Performance
text: Seeking Alpha provides detailed earnings and revenue performance data for HIVE Digital Technologies. The company demonstrates strong revenue growth driven by scaling Bitcoin mining operations and emerging AI/HPC infrastructure business. Recent fiscal periods show revenues of $30-45 million per quarter with significant margins from mining operations. HIVE's earnings surprises have been mixed, with the company sometimes beating and sometimes missing estimates depending on Bitcoin price movements and operational execution. Adjusted EBITDA metrics show improving profitability as mining margins expand. The company's capital allocation strategy emphasizes reinvestment in hashrate expansion and AI infrastructure while maintaining a growing Bitcoin treasury. Key metrics tracked include quarterly revenue, mining revenue, HPC revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and net income.
